SystemStatus.Description: Test failure, system status not correct

BarometricPressureOutOfRangeHigh.Description: Barometric pressure out of range - high

BarometricPressureOutOfRangeLow.Description: Barometric pressure out of range - low

EngineCoolantTemperatureOutOfRangeHigh.Description: Engine coolant temperature too high - Abort

EngineCoolantTemperatureOutOfRangeLow.Description: Engine coolant temperature too low - Abort

EngineOilTemperatureOutOfRangeHigh.Description: Engine oil temperature out of range - high

EngineOilTemperatureOutOfRangeLow.Description: Engine oil temperature out of range - low

OxygenSensor1Bank1OutOfRangeLow.Description: O2 Sensor 1 Bank 1 reading out of limits - low

VINMismatch.Description: ECM VIN does not match scanned VIN

SerialNumberMismatch.Description: Serial Number does not match file

StartModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failed to start keep alive thread

ModuleFault_103D.Description: N0x sensor power relay sticking closed fault

ModuleFault_103E.Description: N0x sensor power relay sticking open fault

ModuleFault_103F.Description: N0x sensor power relay short to GND

ModuleFault_1041.Description: N0x sensor power relay short to battery

ModuleFault_1462.Description: Timeout error for Urea Quality Sensor frame

ModuleFault_1464.Description: Default Fault Check for main relay early opening error

ModuleFault_1465.Description: Visibility of Software Resets in DSM

ModuleFault_1466.Description: Urea tank Quality message J1939 Error

ModuleFault_1491.Description: Report SPI and COM-Errors of a Cj945 fault

ModuleFault_1493.Description: Diagnostic error check for overtemperature fault

ModuleFault_1496.Description: Low Pressure Fi Time Range Fault

ModuleFault_1497.Description: High Pressure Fi Time Range Fault

ModuleFault_1498.Description: SCR catalyst upstream temperature sensor TTCL Error

ModuleFault_149A.Description: Dosing system time to close loop fault

ModuleFault_149C.Description: Reductant delivery system urea pressure reduction error

ModuleFault_149E.Description: Reductant system battery voltage too high

ModuleFault_149F.Description: Reductant system battery voltage too low

ModuleFault_203B.Description: Urea level sensor in tank stuck fault

ModuleFault_203C.Description: Urea tank level sensor SRC Low

ModuleFault_203D.Description: Urea tank level sensor SRC High

ModuleFault_2048.Description: Urea dosing valve circuit short to GND

ModuleFault_2049.Description: Urea dosing valve circuit short to battery

ModuleFault_204B.Description: Supply module urea pressure sensor rationality

ModuleFault_204C.Description: Urea Pump Module Pressure Sensor SRC Low

ModuleFault_204D.Description: Urea Pump Module Pressure Sensor SRC High

ModuleFault_205B.Description: Urea temperature sensor in tank rationality

ModuleFault_205C.Description: Urea Tank temperature sensor SRC Low

ModuleFault_205D.Description: Urea Tank temperature sensor SRC High

ModuleFault_208A.Description: OL error on the PWN output powerstage for the actuator

ModuleFault_208C.Description: Supply module pump motor circuit short to GND

ModuleFault_208D.Description: Supply module pump motor circuit short to battery

ModuleFault_20A0.Description: Urea reverting valve actuator powerstage open load error

ModuleFault_20A2.Description: Urea reverting valve actuator powerstage short to GND

ModuleFault_20A3.Description: Urea reverting valve actuator powerstage short to battery

ModuleFault_20AD.Description: Supply Module Temperature Sensor Plausibility Test Fault

ModuleFault_20B1.Description: Urea tank heater valve circuit open

ModuleFault_20B3.Description: Urea tank heater valve circuit short to GND

ModuleFault_20B4.Description: Urea tank heater valve circuit short to battery

ModuleFault_20E9.Description: Overpressure error regardless of the state

ModuleFault_2202.Description: Front N0x sensor signal circuit short to battery

ModuleFault_2203.Description: Front N0x sensor signal circuit open

ModuleFault_2206.Description: Front N0x sensor heater status signal circuit short to battery

ModuleFault_2207.Description: Front N0x sensor heater status signal circuit open

ModuleFault_2209.Description: Front N0x sensor heater status signal plausibility error

ModuleFault_2222.Description: Downstream N0x sensor heater signal plausibility error

ModuleFault_225C.Description: Upstream N0x sensor offset diagnostic max fault

ModuleFault_225D.Description: Upstream N0x sensor offset diagnostic min fault

ModuleFault_225E.Description: Downstream N0x sensor offset diagnostic max fault

ModuleFault_225F.Description: Downstream N0x sensor offset diagnostic min fault

ModuleFault_229F.Description: Peak diagnosis of downstream N0x sensor fault

ModuleFault_22A0.Description: Downstream N0x sensor OOR diagnosis min fault

ModuleFault_22A1.Description: Downstream N0x sensor OOR diagnosis max fault

ModuleFault_22A4.Description: Downstream N0x sensor SRC open fault

ModuleFault_22A5.Description: Downstream N0x sensor SRC short fault

ModuleFault_22FB.Description: Downstream N0x sensor O2 response 0-30% fault

ModuleFault_22FE.Description: Downstream N0x sensor O2 response 30-60% fault

ModuleFault_242C.Description: Exhaust gas temperature sensor circuit low voltage

ModuleFault_242D.Description: Exhaust gas temperature sensor circuit high voltage
